alt_text: Usage guide for the stark-review skill showing a vertical workflow diagram with five phases: Setup (auth, PR metadata, worktree creation), Review-Fix Loop (18 parallel sub-agents across 3 LLMs and 6 domains with finding classification into fix, recurring, false positive, noise, and ignored categories), Summary generation, Post and Persist (PR comments, bug issues, history), and Cleanup. Includes quick start commands, argument reference table, operating mode comparison (full vs review-only), six output cards (PR comments, automated fixes, bug issues, review history, noise analysis, metrics), finding classification table, common workflow patterns, and related skills.
